Aptitude.desc: Adds 10% to all growth rates during Level Ups.

Supportive.desc: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit has a C Support or higher, the lead unit’s Hit Rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

Miraculous Save.desc: When user is the support unit, the lead unit has a Luck% chance of surviving a fatal attack with 1 HP

Fierce Rival.desc: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit triggers a critical hit, the user is guaranteed a critical hit (if their attack connects)

Gallant.desc: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit is female, the lead unit’s damage +2

Dual Striker.desc: When user is the support unit during Tag Team, Dual Strike damage +3

Dual Guarder.desc: When user is the support unit while paired up, shield gauge gain +1

Tactical Advice.desc: When user is the support unit while paired up, lead unit’s Hit rate +10

Competitive.desc: When user is the lead unit and their Level is lower than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +3 and damage received -1

Bushido.desc: When user is the lead unit, if their Level is higher than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

Noble Cause.desc: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit doesn’t have full HP, damage +3 and damage received +1

Guarded Bravery.desc: When user is the lead unit, damage received -2. If no support unit available, damage received +2

Sisterhood.desc: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit is female, damage +2 and damage received -2

Bold Stance.desc: When user is the lead unit, even when paired up, the support unit can trigger Dual Strikes, but enemy Dual Strikes are not passively negated

Defender.desc: When user is the lead unit while paired up, all stats +1

Nohrian Trust.desc: User shares their support unit’s battle skills

Devoted Partner.desc: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s damage +2, damage received -2

Evasive Partner.desc: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Avoid +15, damage received -3

Forceful Partner.desc: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Hit rate +15, damage +3

Perfectionist.desc: When user’s HP is at maximum, Hit rate and Avoid +15

Born Steward.desc: When fighting in My Castle, Hit rate and Avoid +20, damage +2 and damage received -2

Wind Disciple.desc: When user’s HP is not full, Hit rate and Avoid +10

Lancebreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Lance

Shurikenbreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Dagger

Axebreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with an Axe

Tomebreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Tome

Bowbreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Bow

Swordbreaker.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Sword

Quixotic.desc: User and enemy’s Hit rate +30 and skill activation rate +15% during battle

Lucky Charm.desc: Skills with an activation rate dependent on the Luck stat have their rate increased by 20%

Air Superiority.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +30 when facing Flying enemies

Certain Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, Hit rate +40

Highwayman.desc: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, enemy’s Strength and Speed -3 after the battle (stats recover by 1 each Turn)

Grisly Wound.desc: The enemy’s HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

Fearsome Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle and defeats an enemy, enemies adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 20%

Playthings.desc: After the start of the user’s Turn, all enemies that are adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 5

Heartseeker.desc: When fighting adjacent to an enemy, enemy’s Avoid -20

Fierce Mien.desc: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Avoid reduced by 10

Misfortunate.desc: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade reduced by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is reduced by 5

Solidarity.desc: Adjacent allies receive Avoid +10 and Critical Evade +10

Lilys Poise.desc: Adjacent allies deal 1 extra damage and received 3 less damage

Roses Thorn.desc: Adjacent allies deal 3 extra damage and receive 1 less damage

Dragon Ward.desc: Allies adjacent to the user have a Luck x 0.5% chance of receiving half damage from enemy attacks

Divine Retribution.desc: When user doesn’t have a weapon equipped and they sustain damage from an adjacent enemy, the enemy receives half the same damage.

Counter.desc: When an adjacent enemy triggers the battle and inflicts damage, the enemy receives the same damage

Countercurse.desc: When enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives half the same damage

Countermagic.desc: When the enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives the same damage

Icy Blood.desc: When user’s HP is not full and they sustain damage, the enemy receives the same damage and the enemy’s Skill and Speed is reduced by 3

Triple Threat.desc: When user is under half HP, half the damage received by Swords, Lances or Axes is also dealt to the enemy

Shuriken Mastery.desc: When user receives damage from a Dagger attack, the enemy receives half the same damage and the Dagger’s stat reduction effect

Foreign Princess.desc: “Foreign Army” enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage and receive 2 extra damage

Malefic Aura.desc: Enemies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 extra damage from magical attacks

Voice of Peace.desc: Enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less physical damage

Peacebringer.desc: Allies and enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage

Quiet Strength.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage

Gentilhomme.desc: Female allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

Demoiselle.desc: Male allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

Rallying Cry.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage

Charm.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage during battles

Inspiration.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage and receive 2 less damage during battles

Fortunate Son.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade increased by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is increased by 5

Perfect Pitch.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius who have lower HP than the user recover 10% HP when the “Rally” command is used

Fancy Footwork.desc: Strength and Speed +1 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Magic.desc: Magic +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Luck.desc: Luck +8 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Speed.desc: Speed +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Strength.desc: Strength +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Skill.desc: Skill +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Defence.desc: Defence +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Resistance.desc: Resistance +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Movement.desc: Movement +1 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

Rally Spectrum.desc: All Stats +2 to all allies within a 4 tile radius for one Turn when the Rally command is used

Surefooted.desc: When user is a Ballistician, Movement +1 and all traversable terrain costs 1 movement point to cross

Healing Descant.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

Forager.desc: When standing on Mountain, Woods, Waste or Field terrain, the user recovers 20% HP at the start of the Turn

Draconic Heir.desc: When user is equipped with a Dragonstone, they recover 15% HP at the start of their Turn

Haiku.desc: At the start of the Turn, when two allies are directly above and below Mitama, Mitama recovers 7 HP, while the the two allies recover 5 HP

Renewal.desc: Recover 30% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

Camaraderie.desc: Recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn if there are allies within a 2 tile radius

Amaterasu.desc: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 20% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

Even Better.desc: Recover 40% HP at the start of even-numbered Turns

Better Odds.desc: Recover 40% HP at the start of odd-numbered Turns

Relief.desc: Recover 20% HP at the start of the user’s Turn if no units are within a 2 tile radius

Opportunity Shot.desc: When user is a Ballistician, Skill% chance of attacking an enemy within range at the start of the users Turn

Self-Destruct.desc: At the start of the user’s Turn, if user’s HP is under half, inflicts damage to all enemies and walls within a 2 tile radius; afterwards, the user disappears

Capture.desc: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison. Note: There is no unit limit in Chatquest 2.0. You can learn this skill early

Kidnap.desc: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison. Note: There is no unit limit in Chatquest 2.0. You can learn this skill early

Shove.desc: Select the “Shove” command to push an adjacent ally 1 tile

Swap.desc: Select the “Swap” command to swap places with an adjacent ally on the map

Shelter.desc: Select the “Shelter” command to make an adjacent ally the user’s support unit

Replicate.desc: Select the “Replicate” command once per map to create a replica with the same appearance, stats, inventory and HP as the user (Anything that happens to the replica happens to the user and vice versa–even death)

Lunge.desc: Select the “Lunge” command to swap places with an enemy after an attack

Survey.desc: When using the “Cannon” command, Hit rate +10

Rifled Barrel.desc: When using the “Cannon” command, range +1 and inner/outer range -1

Warp.desc: Select the “Warp” command to instantly move adjacent to an ally and perform another action

Strengthtaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Strength +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Magictaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Magic +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Skilltaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Skill +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Speedtaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Speed +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Lucktaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Luck +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Defensetaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Defence +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Resistancetaker.desc: When user defeats the enemy, Resistance +2 (up to 10) (does not overlap with other Taker skills and expires after the chapter)

Pyrotechnics.desc: When user triggers the battle at under half HP, the user and enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20%

Vantage.desc: At the start of battle, when the user has under half HP, they attack first

Morbid Celebration.desc: When user triggers the battle, recover 20% HP after defeating the enemy

Mischievous.desc: When user triggers the battle and their attack connects with the enemy, enemy’s Defence -3 and enemy is stripped

Bloodthirst.desc: When user triggers the battle and defeats the enemy, Strength, Magic, Skill and Speed +4 for one turn

Duelists Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, Avoid +30

Darting Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, follow up attack speed +5

Wary Fighter.desc: During battles, neither the user or enemy can perform follow up attacks

Poison Strike.desc: When user triggers the battle, the enemy’s HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

Savage Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20% after the battle

Lifetaker.desc: When user triggers the battle, recover 50% HP after defeating the enemy

Galeforce.desc: When user triggers the battle, allows a full action if the user defeats the enemy (once per Turn and no help from a support unit)

Toxic Brew.desc: When user triggers the battle, Skill x 1.5% chance of reducing the enemy’s Movement to 0 and Avoid by 20 after the battle (until the next Turn)

Astra.desc: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering 5 consecutive hits with half damage

Rend Heaven.desc: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the enemy’s Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage

Lethality.desc: Skill x 0.25% chance of instantly defeating the enemy when dealing 1 or more damage

Dragon Fang.desc: Skill x.0.75% chance of adding 50% of the user’s Attack Power as damage

Luna.desc: Skill% chance of ignoring half the enemy’s Defence (if user has a physical weapon) or Resistance (if user has a magical weapon)

Sol.desc: Skill% chance of restoring half the damage dealt to the enemy

Vengeance.desc: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the user’s (Max HP – Current HP) as damage

Aether.desc: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering a Sol hit followed by a Luna hit

Ignis.desc: Skill% chance of adding half the user’s Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage

Underdog.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +15 when user’s Level is lower than the enemy (promoted units count as Level +20)

Lucky Seven.desc: Hit rate and Avoid +20 for the first seven Turns

Awakening.desc: When HP is under half, Hit rate, Avoid, Critical rate and Critical Evade +30

Vow of Friendship.desc: If the Avatar is an ally, when the Avatar is under half HP, user’s damage +3 and damage received -3. Note: It's unlikely that Avatar is pairing up

Fiery Blood.desc: When user’s HP is not full, damage +4

Pride.desc: When user’s Level is lower than the enemy’s (promoted units count as Level +20), damage +3

Nohr Enmity.desc: When engaging a Nohr-related enemy, damage +3

Prodigy.desc: At the start of the battle, if the enemy’s Strength or Magic (whichever is highest) is higher than Caeldori’s corresponding stat, damage +4

Vendetta.desc: When user triggers the battle, if they’ve already fought the enemy in the same map, damage +4

Puissance.desc: When user’s Strength is 5 or more points higher than the enemy’s Strength, damage +3 during battle

Opportunist.desc: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, damage +4

Unmask.desc: When engaging a female enemy, Damage +4 and Critical rate +20

Pragmatic.desc: When enemy’s HP is not full, damage +3 and damage received -1 during the battle

Chivalry.desc: When enemy’s HP is at maximum, damage +2 and damage received -2 during the battle

Fierce Counter.desc: When a male enemy triggers the battle, damage +2

Daydream.desc: When user is adjacent to two male units paired up, damage +2 and damage received -2

Swordfaire.desc: When user is equipped with a Sword, damage +5 during battle

Lancefaire.desc: When user is equipped with a Lance, damage +5 during battle

Tomefaire.desc: When user is equipped with a Tome, damage +5 during battle

Bowfaire.desc: When user is equipped with a Bow, damage +5 during battle

Shurikenfaire.desc: When user is equipped with a Dagger, damage +5 during battle

Axefaire.desc: When user is equipped with an Axe, damage +5 during battle

Quick Draw.desc: When user triggers the battle, damage +4

Spendthrift.desc: During battles, user spends a Gold Bar for damage +10 and damage received -10

Elbow Room.desc: When user fights in terrain with no terrain effects, damage +3 during battles

Strong Riposte.desc: When enemy triggers the battle, damage +3

Trample.desc: Unless enemy is on a mount, damage +5

Aggressor.desc: When user triggers the battle, Damage +7

Warding Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, magical damage received -20

Armored Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, physical damage received -10

Natural Cover.desc: When user fights in terrain with terrain effects, damage received -3 during battles

Even Keel.desc: During even-numbered Turns, magical damage received -4

Iron Will.desc: When enemy triggers the battle, magical damage received -4

Collector.desc: Luck% chance of obtaining 3 Minerals or Foodstuffs after moving up to the 7th Turn

Goody Basket.desc: At the start of the Turn, Luck% chance of recovering 10% HP

Make a Killing.desc: Luck% chance of obtaining Gold after defeating an enemy

Salvage Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of receiving a Katana, Naginata, Club, Yumi or Shuriken if the user defeats the enemy

Future Sight.desc: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of gaining double experience when user defeats the enemy

Nobility.desc: Experience gained x 1.2. Note: Also gives Dragon Blood

Paragon.desc: Experience gained is doubled. Don't pick this. Just here for completion.

Void Curse.desc: No experience is gained from fighting this enemy

Miracle.desc: Luck% chance of leaving the user with 1 HP when they have 2 or more HP

Profiteer.desc: Luck% chance of obtaining a Gold Bar after moving during the first seven Turns

Good Fortune.desc: Luck% chance of recovering 20% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

Witchs Brew.desc: Luck% chance of obtaining a potion item (eg. Vulnerary) after moving during the first seven Turns

In Extremis.desc: When user’s HP is under a quarter, Critical rate +30

Aching Blood.desc: When equipped with a forged weapon whose name is at least 12 characters, Critical rate +10

Bibliophile.desc: When user is carrying 3 or more Tomes, Critical rate +10

Death Blow.desc: When user triggers the battle, Critical rate +20

Pavise.desc: Skill% chance of halving damage from Sword, Lance, Axe, Beaststone, Claw or Puppet attacks

Aegis.desc: Skill% chance of halving damage from Bow, Magic, Dagger, Dragonstone, Breath or Stone attacks

Shadowgift.desc: User can equip Dark Mage exclusive Tomes (only Nosferatu so far)

Point Blank.desc: User can attack enemies at 1 Range with a Bow

Optimist.desc: When user is healed by a staff, they recover 1.5 times the normal HP

Reciprocity.desc: When a unit uses a healing staff on the user, that unit has their HP recovered by half the same amount

Live to Serve.desc: When healing an ally, the user recovers the same amount of HP

Optimistic.desc: After choosing to Wait, Speed +4 and Luck +8 for one Turn

Sweet Tooth.desc: After choosing to Wait, user recovers 4 HP by eating hidden treats

Calm.desc: After choosing to Wait, Skill and Resistance +4 for one Turn

Locktouch.desc: User can open doors and chests without requiring keys

Golembane.desc: Attacks are effective against Mechanists, Automatons and Stoneborn

Beastbane.desc: When user is a Wolfskin or Kitsune, their attacks are effective against Beast units. Note: Your character becomes a furry

Potent Potion.desc: The effect of HP recovery and stat-boosting potions is increased by 50%

Quick Salve.desc: After consuming a HP recovery or stat-boosting potion, the user can perform another action

Inspiring Song.desc: Skill, Speed and Luck +3 for one Turn for the unit who receives the user’s song. Note: Gives your character the sing command from the very start. You cannot sing for other characters with the Sing action

Pass.desc: User can pass through tiles occupied by enemy units

Clarity.desc: User recovers from status reduction effects twice as fast

Resist Status.desc: Halves status reduction effects, Poison damage and status staff Hit rate

Winged Shield.desc: When user is a Flying unit, their Flying weakness is nullified and they will receive terrain effects

Inevitable End.desc: Stat reduction effects on the enemy will stack

Immune Status.desc: Negates status reduction effects, Poison damage and status staff Hit rate

Divine Shield.desc: Halves damage and negates Lethality, Poison and Counter-type skills.

Dragonskin.desc: Halves damage, weakens critical hits and special skills (eg. Astra, Luna, Sol) and negates Lethality, Poison and Counter-type skills.

Immobilize.desc: If user’s attack connects with the enemy, the enemy’s Movement is reduced to 0 and Avoid reduced by 20 until the next Turn

Inevitable End.desc: Stat reduction effects on the enemy will stack
